title: Section 15E
content: 1[15E. Penalty amount to be credited to Environmental Protection Fund.--Where any penalty or additional penalty, as the case may be, is imposed under sections 14A, 14B, 15, 15A or section 15B, the amount of the penalty shall be credited to the Environmental Protection Fund established under section 16.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 2023, s. 2 and Schedule, for sections 15 to 17 (w.e.f. 1-4-2024).
